channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Notre Dame faces Penn State with trip to the national title game on the line
item.description: No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No. 5 Penn State (13-2, CFP No. 6 seed), Thursday, 7:30 p.m. EST (ESPN) BetMGM College Football Odds: Notre Dame by 1 1/2. Series record: Tied 9-9-1.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Female athletes were 'emotionally blackmailed' over SJSU trans volleyball scandal, Riley Gaines says
item.description: Witnesses opened up on the "terror" that college women's volleyball players experienced this season amid a national scandal involving a transgender player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders fire general manager Tom Telesco after just 1 season, enter total rebuild of staff
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders announced Thursday, just two days after firing Antonio Pierce, that they have fired general manager Tom Telesco, who held the job just one year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tyreek Hill's agent says he's committed to the Dolphins and he played in 2024 with a broken wrist
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tyreek Hill is committed to the Miami Dolphins, his agent said, despite the star wide receiver seeming to indicate otherwise last week.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NBA postpones game between Lakers and Hornets due to wildfires in Los Angeles area
item.description: Monday night's NFL wild-card playoff game between Rams and Vikings still set for SoFi Stadium, but would be played in Arizona if game has to be moved
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's number will be retired by the junior USHL's Dubuque Fighting Saints
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau's jersey number will be retired by his junior team at a ceremony this weekend honoring him and his late brother, Matthew. The Dubuque Fighting Saints of the United States Hockey League will raise Gaudreau’s No.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Browns' Myles Garrett has heartwarming moment with Ravens rookie after jersey swap ask
item.description: NFL Films on Tuesday released a sweet moment on Tuesday showing the interaction between Cleveland Browns star Myles Garrett and Baltimore Ravens rookie Roger Rosengarten.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep roundup: No. 2 Mountain View ends No. 10 Palo Alto’s undefeated run, Acalanes wins on buzzer-beater
item.description: Mountain View comes out on top in top-10 SCVAL league clash. Acalanes beats Ygnacio Valley on buzzer-beating 3-pointer. Plus, much more from Bay Area prep sports.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Deion Sanders reveals only way he would coach in NFL
item.description: Colorado Buffaloes football head coach Deion Sanders spoke Wednesday about the only way he could see himself coaching in the NFL at some point.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At the end of another stellar season, Ravens' Lamar Jackson will still face doubters in the playoffs
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — As far as Lamar Jackson is concerned, most of his postseason disappointments are well in the past. There's one obvious exception — last year's AFC championship game, when the top-seeded Ravens were at home against Kansas City but still couldn't overcome the Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: University City 61, Lincoln 59
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- What a game on the hardwood at University City in boys action with the Centurions beating Lincoln in double overtime 61-59. Dylan Griffin paced the Centurions with a game high 38 points.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Squabble grows as US government holds back 2024 funding from world anti-doping watchdog WADA
item.description: The U.S. government did not pay the more than $3.6 million due to the World Anti-Doping Agency in 2024, making good on a long-running threat anchored in unhappiness with the global watchdog's handling of cases involving Chinese swimmers and others.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Top-ranked Central girls wrestling is all about toughness and grit
item.description: Undefeated as a team to start the season, Central girls wrestling was just ranked 20th in the entire country by FloWrestling.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: LIV Golf fills out its 2025 schedule with final 3 events going head-to-head with PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf will play its final three events in the United States the same week as the FedEx Cup playoffs on the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Verizon to bring Super Bowl FanFest to life in 30 cities, offering NFL championship hype nationwide
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Caesars Superdome may be the epicenter for the Super Bowl in New Orleans next month, but Verizon has a game plan to ensure the championship excitement stretches beyond the Big Easy.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
